articles.title: Got $20K? Steve Jobs & John Lasseter signed 'Toy Story' book is up for auction
articles.description: A rare first-edition "Toy Story" book signed by Steve Jobs will go up for auction on April 30, 2026, in Los Angeles, tied directly to the Pixar IPO that made him a billionaire. Toy Story book Nate D. Sanders Auctions will auction a rare Steve Jobs artifact on April 30, in Los Angeles. Bidding will start at $20,000, targeting seasoned collectors of high-end Apple and film memorabilia. A first-edition copy of "Toy Story: The Art and Making of the Animated Film" signed by Steve Jobs and John Lasseter anchors the lot. Their signatures tie together Pixar's financial backing and creative leadership at a pivotal moment in the company's history. An original "Toy Story" promotional brochure housed in a red leather case is also included. Added material presents the offering as a complete display piece with stronger historical context. Continue Reading on AppleInsider | Discuss on our Forums

articles.title: Honda ZR-V Hybrid SUV Launch Soon With Near 1,000 km Range
articles.description:
Honda car India is back and with new launches with the ZR-V now coming to India. This is the first time that the ZR-V nameplate is coming to India and would be positioned above the discontinued CR-V. The talking point would be a hybrid powertrain with a near 1000km range per full tank. The ZR-V will come to India via the CBU route and would be a rival to the likes of the Skoda Kodiaq, Volkswagen Tayron and other premium 5 seater SUVs.

It is around 4.5m plus in length and has unique styling with an aggressive front end styling. It will be feature packed with ventilated seats, dual zone climate control and a panoramic sunroof plus a powered tailgate and more. The hybrid powertrain would be the main talking point as it is something not offered on other such 5 seater premium SUVs. The ZR-V is sold outside in many global markets and is a popular model while in India it will be positioned as a premium SUV being an import.

The ZR-V is Honda's premium push and will be the start of new models coming from the Japanese carmaker as it plans to bring in a new wave of models. The ZR-V won't be a volume model as instead it will be a halo model and will probably be launched in limited numbers.

articles.description: Meta is investing in new energy solutions for its AI data centers. The company is partnering to bring space solar energy to Earth, providing power around the clock. articles.title: Elon Musk vs Sam Altman courtroom battle begins today: Here’s what you need to know
600 Google staff urge CEO Sundar Pichai to reject classified military AI contract
articles.description: More than 600 Google employees demanded Monday that the company reject a proposed Pentagon deal that would allow its artificial intelligence technology to be deployed in classified military operations, a statement said. Google already holds a contract with the US Department of Defense on non-classified workloads through a program known as genAI.mil, and the proposed new deal would extend Gemini's capabilities into classified domains.

articles.title: 7 Ways to extend the life of your washing machine with simple care
articles.description: Extend your washing machine's lifespan with simple habits. Avoid overstuffing the drum and using excessive soap to prevent strain and residue buildup. Regularly clean the filter, leave the door open after use, and consider replacing old hoses for safety. A monthly hot vinegar wash and checking pockets before loading also contribute to optimal performance and longevity.

articles.title: From updates to utility: 5 iPhone features users must use
articles.description: Apple’s latest iPhone update highlights its long-term software support, extending meaningful features even to older devices like the iPhone 6. Beyond major upgrades, the update brings several underrated tools that enhance everyday use. Features such as Visual Intelligence for real-time recognition, Find My alerts to prevent losing devices, Center Stage for automatic framing, Dual Capture for recording from both cameras, and Adaptive Power Mode for smarter battery management work quietly in the background.

articles.title: Passenger Vehicle growth to slow to 4-6 % in FY27 on high base, macro risks; UVs to drive demand: ICRA
articles.description: Passenger vehicle industry growth in India is set to slow down in FY2027. This moderation follows strong performance in FY2026. Factors like a weak monsoon and global economic risks will be closely watched. Demand is expected to remain supported by GST rate cuts and new vehicle launches. Utility vehicles continue to lead sales. Exports also saw a significant increase.

articles.title: HCL-Foxconn selects CTCI as EPC partner for Uttar Pradesh semiconductor facility
articles.description: The HCL-Foxconn joint venture has appointed Taiwanese firm CTCI as the EPC partner for its upcoming semiconductor assembly and testing facility in Uttar Pradesh. This Rs 3,706 crore OSAT plant will manufacture display driver chips, marking CTCI's entry into India's semiconductor sector. CTCI's existing relationship with Foxconn was a key factor in securing the deal.

articles.title: Platforms, brands accelerate agentic commerce push as fintechs plug payment gaps
articles.description: Indian ecommerce giants like Flipkart and Bigbasket are building AI storefronts to enable agentic commerce, allowing AI to shop autonomously on platforms like ChatGPT. Fintechs have enabled payments, paving the way for automated searching, ordering, and payment. Brands are preparing for this future, with quick commerce and travel sectors leading adoption.
